mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, guardian_name, guardian_mobile_encrypted, guardian_id_no_encrypted, relation_type, is_primary, status, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM guardian_relation WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND patient_id = #{patientId} AND is_primary = TRUE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM guardian_relation WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guardian_relation ( tenant_id, patient_id, guardian_name, guardian_mobile_encrypted, guardian_id_no_encrypted, relation_type, is_primary, status ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{guardianName}, #{guardianMobileEncrypted}, #{guardianIdNoEncrypted}, #{relationType}, #{isPrimary}, #{status} )
